<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class Redirect extends TwiML { /** * Redirect constructor. * * @param string $url Redirect URL * @param array $attributes Optional attributes */ public function __construct($url, $attributes = []) { parent::__construct('Redirect', $url, $attributes); } /** * Add Method attribute. * * @param string $method Redirect URL method */ public function setMethod($method): self { return $this->setAttribute('method', $method); } }
